meta.title: Deepseek Coder vs CodeLlama vs Claude vs OpenAI
meta.description:
Trelis.com - for inference, fine-tuning and function-calling scripts.

* Deepseek Inference *
One-click template: https://runpod.io/gsc?template=51tpe9tqk2&ref=jmfkcdio
TheBloke AWQ: https://huggingface.co/TheBloke/deepseek-coder-6.7B-instruct-AWQ

* Deepseek 1.3B, 6.7B and 33B function-calling models *
https://huggingface.co/Trelis/deepseek-coder-33b-instruct-function-calling-v2

* Inference Guide *
https://trelis.com/enterprise-server-api-and-inference-guide/

* Fine-tuning Scripts *
https://trelis.com/advanced-fine-tuning-scripts/
Full Repo Includes:
- LLM Comparison Notebook from this video
- Supervised fine-tuning
- Unsupervised fine-tuning
- Quantization scripts
- Function calling / Structured response fine-tuning
- Embeddings notebook
OR buy only the LLM Comparison Notebook here: https://buy.stripe.com/5kAcNy8G12Hxg7edRr


Chapters:
0:00 Deepseek coder
0:24 Agenda
1:03 Model sizes and license
2:02 Prompt format
3:36 Inference on Runpod
5:05 Performance vs CodeLlama, OpenAI, Claude
7:04 Returning a sequence in reverse
10:40 Passkey retrieval
16:23 Website generation
24:20 Function calling
25:22 Resources
